---
title: Stats Comics
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: render-comic
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false


library(yaml)
library(purrr)
library(htmltools)

comics_df <- "data/comics.yml"

comics <- yaml::read_yaml(comics_df)
nodes <- lapply(comics, function(c) {
  tags$div(
  class="card",
  tags$a(
    href = c$file,
    target = "_blank",
    tags$img(src = c$thumb, class = "comic-thumb", alt = c$title)
    ),
  tags$div(tags$h3(c$title)),
  tags$div(class="meta", paste0(if (!is.null(c$year)) c$year else "")),
  if (!is.null(c$caption)) tags$p(c$caption)
    )
  })

div(class="card-grid", nodes)

```
